title: oncerum acaule
intro: Oncerum acaule is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae, also known as the bellflower family. It is native to the western Himalayas and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Oncerum acaule can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
